steps.title: Compute the boundary list
steps.content: All answer choices use $x=3$, $5$, and $7$. Enter $x_1=[3,5,7]$ and compute $6x_1+2$. Desmos returns the cutoff list $[20,32,44]$.

steps.title: Compare choice C to the boundary
steps.content: Choice C has $y$-values $16$, $28$, and $40$. Enter $c_1=[16,28,40]$ and compare $c_1<6x_1+2$. All three comparisons are true.

steps.title: Eliminate the failed choices
steps.content: Choice A fails because it includes $y=20$ when $x=3$, and $20<20$ is false. Choice B fails because $36<32$ is false when $x=5$. Choice D fails because $24<20$ is false when $x=3$. So choice C is correct.
